businesses.name: VESSEL
businesses.description: SOUL.md, AGENTS.md, HEARTBEAT.md, CORRECTIONS.md templates + skills kit. Everything you need to run a real AI studio from day one.

businesses.name: DRAFT
businesses.description: Pre-written crypto/AI hooks, threads, and posts + the Anthropic split sub-agent method (headlines agent + descriptions agent). Proven at scale.

businesses.name: STACK
businesses.description: Opinionated list of MCPs, CLIs, skills, and tools organized by problem — not category. Surgical selection over everything. Updated as the stack evolves.

businesses.name: BLUEPRINT
businesses.description: The operator/grower/builder model. How to structure a 3-agent studio — roles, authority chain, task queues, comms, review gates. The Kikai/Yama/Kodo playbook.

businesses.name: LEDGER
businesses.description: On-chain + Stripe tracking in one place. BaseScan + Solscan + Stripe API. Real code, not Notion. For indie makers selling for USDC.

businesses.name: FLOW
businesses.description: Matt Epstein launch method applied to AI-economy products. Promoter seeding, 60-account coordination, day-of execution. Distribution beats content every time.

businesses.name: PULSE
businesses.description: Site health checks, cron monitoring, heartbeat configs, failure detection. Scripts, templates, and setup guide. Catch problems before they become outages.

businesses.name: FORGE
businesses.description: PRD-driven AI coding with tmux + ralphy + completion hooks. Fresh context on every retry. Agents can't fake done. No more stalled Codex sessions.

businesses.name: SIGNAL
businesses.description: Art of Memetics applied to crypto community launches. Culture-first strategy, meme architecture, community seeding. 67-derived and battle-tested.

businesses.name: MINT
businesses.description: How to sell your work for USDC. Wallet setup, For Crypto listing guide, co-sell model, instant settlement. No Stripe, no chargebacks, global by default.
